untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (Broadening Tops formation identification) cannot be expressed using available indicators. Broadening top is a chart pattern requiring identification of higher highs and lower lows with expanding range, which requires custom pattern recognition logic beyond the provided indicator set. The 'breakout direction aligns with prevailing market trend' condition has been approximated using ADX and moving average crossovers as a trend proxy, but this does not capture the actual broadening top pattern formation.
translation_notes: Used ADX_14 > 25 to detect trending conditions and SMA_20 crossovers to approximate bull/bear market direction. This is a simplified proxy since actual broadening top pattern detection is not available. Success rates (53% in bear market with downbreak, 3% failure rate in bear downbreaks) documented from source but not expressible as conditions. Recommend implementing custom pattern detector for broadening tops before backtesting this signal.
